description: Chart wrappers that position native charts within bounds with source annotations

bar.description: Clustered column bar chart with optional source line

stacked_bar.description: Stacked column bar chart with optional source line

horizontal_bar.description: Horizontal bar chart with optional highlight color on one bar

line.description: Line chart with optional dashed reference series

donut.description: Doughnut chart with configurable hole_size and data labels

area.description: Stacked area chart with optional source line
